creator: timur@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: feedback->closed

Thanks a lot for your report! 

This problem is solved in Samba 3.0.25b release, as well as in 'c', port 
of which is going to follow very soon. Due that fact I don't see much 
sense in patching current port version, as 'c' contains other important 
fixes as well. 

With best regards, 
Timur.
